content_en:
Ibn ‘Umar # reported that the Messenger of Allah i said, “Indeed Allah will grasp the heavens with His Right, and then will say, “I am the King.” (Bukhaaree and Muslim) In another narration, Ibn “Umar .& reported that one day, the Messenger of Allah 2% recited this Verse on the Minbar (pulpit):

oc ge BOG ioe

acail EES BES 66S BG oh & ait Lota ape 4oEE oo EG yisaen leew dows € ESbs S508 GAN

“They made not a just estimate of Allah such as is due to Him, And

on the Day of Resurrection the whole of the earth will be grasped by

His Hand and the heavens will be rolled up in His Right Hand.

Glorified is He, and High is He above all that they associate as

partners with Him!) The Messenger of Allah 2% said such with his hand, moving it forward and turning it around; the Lord will glorify Himself: “I am the All-Mighty! I am Al-Mutakabbir (the Omnipotent)! I am the Most Powerful! I am the Most Generous!” The Minbar shook with, the Messenger of Allah #¥ on it. Ibn ‘Umar < said, “We said, ‘It will fall down with him.”” Imam Ahmad and Muslim related this narration, and the wording is that of the former.

He ## said in the hadith of the horn: The earth will be changed to another earth. Then He $¥ will unfold, even out, spread, and then extend it, like the extending of tanned leather...”

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 241

“You will see therein nothing crooked or curved.’

Then Allah will drive out the creation, and they will end up in the one that replaced it (in the earth that replaced it). Allah 4% said:

“On the Day when the earth will be changed to another earth and so will be the heavens, and they (all creatures) will appear before Allah, the One, the Irresistible.”

‘Aaisha % reported that the Messenger of Allah # was asked, “Where will the people be when the earth and the heavens will be replaced?” He xg said, “In the darkness before the bridge.” (Muslint) The changing of the earth might have a meaning other than the one mentioned in the aforesaid hadith: the features and characteristics of the earth will undergo a change between the two blows of the horn, the blowing of the swooning away and the blowing of the resurrection. The mountains will move and the earth will shake, and then all will become a single plane, with no crookedness therein, no hills, and no valleys. Allah 8% said:

66 Wo ES gy Gt I od gy Depp

4G) Ge Ge who Gis “And they ask you concerning the mountains, say: “My Lord will blast them and scatter them as particles of dust. Then He shall leave it as a level smooth plain. You will see therein nothing crooked or curved,“

This means that it will be smooth, with no lowness or highness to the land.

And Allah 3% said: ie SKS IE sts “And the mountains shall be moved away from their places and

they will be as if they were a mirage,"

242 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

RSET Ne Jill 355

“And the mountains will be like carded wool.’ ins & Gis MG AN dp

“And the earth and mountains shall be removed from their places, and crushed with a single crushing,"

And Allah dé said:

na) a jie Be re | wh OM Sh SCE 2 ee be G Kae & oes AE EMP 9

“And (remember) the Day We shall cause the mountains to pass away (like clouds of dust), and you will see the earth as a leveled plain, and we shall gather them all together so as to leave not one of them behind. And they will be set before your Lord in (lines as) rows, (and Allah will say): “Now indeed, you have come to Us as We created you the first time. Nay, but you thought that We had appointed no meeting for you (with Us).’"

The Prophet #3 said in the hadith of the trumpet: “Then Allah will send water from underneath the Throne, and then the sky will give rain for forty days, until the water will be above you by 12 armspans. Then Allah % will order for bodies to grow, like the growing of At-Taraatheeth (small Egyptian cucumbers) or like the growing of vegetables.

Ina previously mentioned hadith related by ‘Abdullah ibn ‘Umar fs, the Messenger of Allah 48 said, “Then the horn (Trumpet) will be blown, no one will hear it except that he tilts his head forward and back ward. And the first to hear it is a man who is plastering his

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 243,

basin, and he will swoon away. Everyone that hears it will swoon away. Then Allah # will send rain that is like dewdrops or the shade. From it the bodies of the creation will grow. Then it will be blown into another time, and they will be standing, looking. Then it will be said, ‘O people, come to your Lord!” (Ahmad and Muslim)

Ubai Ibn Ka‘ab said, “Six signs before the Day of Resurrection. While the people are in their marketplaces, the light of the sun will depart. While they are upon that state, the mountains will fall onto the face of the earth. It will shake, tremble, and intermingle. The jinn will take recourse to mankind, and mankind will take recourse to jinn. Animals and beasts and birds will intermingle, and will surge into one another. Allah a said:

“And when the wild beasts shall be gathered together.""") Heike Sal 5

“And when the pregnant she-camels shall be neglected.

244 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

“And when the seas shall become as blazing Fire or shall overflow,")

“The jinn will say to mankind, ‘We come to you with news.’ They will go to the sea, and it will be like a blazing fire. While they are upon that state, the earth will split and make one crack that reaches the lower seventh earth, and reaches the highest seventh sky. And when they are upon that state, a wind will come to them and make them die.” Abu Bakr Ibn Abee Ad-Dunyaa related this narration. ‘Ataa Ibn Yazeed As-Saksakee said, “After taking the life of ‘Eesa ibn Maryam and when the Hour will be near at hand, Allah will send a good wind, which will take the soul of every believer. Only the most evil of people will remain; they will do lewd acts in the open just as donkeys do: upon them the Hour will arrive. When they are upon that condition, Allah will send a tremor to the people of the earth, and it will shake their feet and their abodes. Mankind, the jinn, and the devils will come out, each seeking a way out. They will go to the Western Khaafiq, and they will find that it is blocked, and over it are defenders. Then they will return to the people, and while they are upon that condition, the Hour will Sharragat upon them (arrive upon them, perhaps meaning from the east). They will hear a caller call out, ‘O people, the Event is come to pass, so seek not to hasten it.’ A woman will not be listening more attentively than the infant in her lap. Then the trumpet will be blown, and those in the heavens and the earth will swoon away, except for those whom Allah 4% exempts.” Ibn Abu Ad-Dunyaa related this narration.

Fudaalah ibn ‘Ubaid .& and ‘Ugqbah ibn ‘Aamir related that the Prophet #% said, “A black cloud, like a shield, will rise over you from the direction of the west, It will continue to rise and rise until it fills the clouds. And a caller will call out, ‘O people, indeed the Matter of Allah has indeed arrived.’ By the One Who has my soul in His hand, two men will spread out a garment (to trade it) and they will not fold it. And a man will be plastering his basin, but he will not drink from it. And a man will milk his Lighah (a camel that gives off much milk), but he will not drink anything from it.” Ibn Abu Ad-

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 245

Dunyaa related this narration as well.

‘Abdullah ibn ‘Umar 4 reported that the Messenger of Allah 2% said, “Whosoever it pleases to look at the Day of Resurrection with the vision of the eye, then let him recite:

“When the sun Kuwwirat (wound round and lost its light is overthrown)."1

SE ht A yb “When the heaven is cleft asunder.

“When the heaven is split asunder.

Jbn Abu Ad-Dunyaa related this narration, and it is also related by Ahmad and At-Tirmidhee through another chain.

The Blowing Of The Resurrection Allah % said:

“And the Trumpet will be blown, and all who are in the heavens and all who are on the earth will swoon away, except kim whom Allah wills. Then it will be blown a second time and behold, they will be standing, looking on (waiting), And the earth will shine with the light of its Lord (Allah, when He will come to judge among

246 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

men) and the Book will be placed (open) and the Prophets and the witnesses will be brought forward, and it will be judged between them with truth, and they will not be wronged. And each person will be paid in full of what he did; and He is Best Aware of what they do."
content_id:
Ibn 'Umar # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah i bersabda, "Sesungguhnya Allah akan menggenggam langit-langit dengan Tangan Kanan-Nya, kemudian akan berfirman, 'Akulah Al-Malik (Raja).'" (Bukhari dan Muslim) Dalam riwayat lain, Ibn 'Umar .& meriwayatkan bahwa pada suatu hari, Rasulullah 2% membaca ayat ini di atas Minbar:

oc ge BOG ioe

acail EES BES 66S BG oh & ait Lota ape 4oEE oo EG yisaen leew dows € ESbs S508 GAN

"Mereka tidak mengagungkan Allah dengan pengagungan yang semestinya bagi-Nya, padahal

pada hari Kiamat seluruh bumi berada dalam genggaman-Nya, dan langit-langit digulung

dengan Tangan Kanan-Nya.

Mahasuci Dia, dan Mahatinggi Dia dari segala sesuatu yang mereka persekutukan

dengan-Nya!" Rasulullah 2% bersabda demikian sambil menggerakkan tangannya ke depan dan memutarnya; Rabb akan memuliakan diri-Nya: "Akulah Al-'Aziz (Yang Mahaperkasa)! Akulah Al-Mutakabbir (Yang Mahaagung)! Akulah Yang Maha Kuat! Akulah Yang Maha Dermawan!" Minbar pun berguncang dengan Rasulullah #¥ yang berada di atasnya. Ibn 'Umar < berkata, "Kami berkata, 'Minbar itu akan jatuh membawa beliau.'" Imam Ahmad dan Muslim meriwayatkan hadith ini, dan redaksinya adalah redaksi yang pertama.

Beliau ## bersabda dalam hadith sangkakala: Bumi akan diganti dengan bumi yang lain. Kemudian Dia $¥ akan membentangkan, meratakan, menghamparkan, dan kemudian memanjangkannya, seperti memanjangkan kulit yang telah disamak..."

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar 241

"Tidak akan kamu lihat di sana sesuatu yang bengkok atau melengkung."

Kemudian Allah akan menggiring seluruh makhluk, dan mereka akan sampai pada bumi yang menggantikannya. Allah 4% berfirman:

"Pada hari (ketika) bumi diganti dengan bumi yang lain dan (demikian pula) langit, dan mereka semua (makhluk) tampil menghadap Allah Yang Maha Esa lagi Mahaperkasa."

'Aaisha % meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah # pernah ditanya, "Di manakah manusia ketika bumi dan langit diganti?" Beliau xg bersabda, "Di dalam kegelapan sebelum jembatan." (Muslim) Pergantian bumi mungkin memiliki makna selain yang disebutkan dalam hadith di atas: ciri-ciri dan keadaan bumi akan mengalami perubahan di antara dua tiupan sangkakala, yaitu tiupan yang mematikan dan tiupan yang membangkitkan. Gunung-gunung akan bergerak dan bumi akan berguncang, kemudian semuanya menjadi dataran yang rata, tanpa kebengkokan, tanpa bukit, dan tanpa lembah. Allah 8% berfirman:

66 Wo ES gy Gt I od gy Depp

4G) Ge Ge who Gis "Dan mereka bertanya kepadamu tentang gunung-gunung, maka katakanlah: 'Tuhanku akan menghancurkannya dan menjadikannya debu yang beterbangan. Kemudian Dia akan menjadikannya sebagai hamparan yang datar. Tidak akan kamu lihat di sana sesuatu yang bengkok atau melengkung,'"

Artinya bumi akan rata, tanpa kerendahan maupun ketinggian pada permukaannya.

Dan Allah 3% berfirman: ie SKS IE sts "Dan gunung-gunung akan dipindahkan dari tempatnya dan

akan menjadi seperti fatamorgana,"

242 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar

RSET Ne Jill 355

"Dan gunung-gunung akan menjadi seperti bulu yang dihambur-hamburkan." ins & Gis MG AN dp

"Dan bumi serta gunung-gunung akan diangkat dan dihancurkan dengan sekali hantaman,"

Dan Allah dé berfirman:

na) a jie Be re | wh OM Sh SCE 2 ee be G Kae & oes AE EMP 9

"Dan (ingatlah) hari (ketika) Kami menjalankan gunung-gunung (bagaikan awan), dan kamu akan melihat bumi sebagai hamparan yang datar, dan Kami kumpulkan mereka semua tanpa meninggalkan seorang pun. Dan mereka akan dihadapkan kepada Tuhanmu dengan (berbaris dalam) barisan, (dan Allah akan berfirman): 'Sungguh kalian datang kepada Kami sebagaimana Kami menciptakan kalian pertama kali. Bahkan kalian mengira bahwa Kami tidak akan menetapkan waktu pertemuan bagi kalian (dengan Kami).'"

Nabi #3 bersabda dalam hadith sangkakala: "Kemudian Allah akan menurunkan air dari bawah 'Arsy, lalu langit akan menurunkan hujan selama empat puluh hari, hingga air tersebut berada setinggi 12 hasta di atas kalian. Kemudian Allah % akan memerintahkan tubuh-tubuh untuk tumbuh, seperti tumbuhnya At-Taraatheeth (sejenis mentimun kecil Mesir) atau seperti tumbuhnya sayur-mayur.

Dalam hadith yang telah disebutkan sebelumnya yang diriwayatkan oleh 'Abdullah ibn 'Umar fs, Rasulullah 48 bersabda, "Kemudian sangkakala akan ditiup, tidak ada seorang pun yang mendengarnya melainkan ia menundukkan kepalanya ke depan dan ke belakang. Dan orang pertama yang mendengarnya adalah seorang lelaki yang sedang menambal tepinya wadah (bak)nya, dan ia pun tersungkur. Setiap orang yang mendengarnya akan tersungkur. Kemudian Allah # akan menurunkan hujan bagaikan titik embun atau teduhan. Dari hujan itulah tubuh-tubuh makhluk akan tumbuh. Kemudian sangkakala akan ditiup untuk kedua kalinya, dan mereka pun berdiri dalam keadaan memandang. Lalu dikatakan, 'Wahai manusia, datanglah kepada Tuhanmu!'" (Ahmad dan Muslim)

Ubai Ibn Ka'ab berkata, "Enam tanda sebelum Hari Kiamat. Ketika manusia sedang berada di pasar-pasar mereka, cahaya matahari akan lenyap. Ketika mereka berada dalam keadaan demikian, gunung-gunung akan berjatuhan ke permukaan bumi. Bumi pun akan berguncang, bergetar, dan bercampur aduk. Bangsa jin akan berlindung kepada manusia, dan manusia akan berlindung kepada jin. Binatang, hewan buas, dan burung-burung akan bercampur aduk dan berdesakan satu sama lain. Allah a berfirman:

"Dan apabila binatang-binatang liar dikumpulkan.""") Heike Sal 5

"Dan apabila unta-unta yang bunting ditinggalkan."

244 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar

"Dan apabila lautan dijadikan meluap atau menjadi api yang menyala-nyala,")

"Bangsa jin akan berkata kepada manusia, 'Kami datang membawa kabar kepada kalian.' Mereka pun pergi menuju lautan, dan lautan itu bagaikan api yang menyala-nyala. Ketika mereka berada dalam keadaan demikian, bumi akan terbelah dengan satu celahan yang mencapai lapisan ketujuh bumi yang paling bawah, dan mencapai langit ketujuh yang paling tinggi. Dan ketika mereka berada dalam keadaan demikian, angin akan datang menghembus dan mematikan mereka." Abu Bakr Ibn Abee Ad-Dunyaa meriwayatkan hadith ini. 'Ataa Ibn Yazeed As-Saksakee berkata, "Setelah Allah mewafatkan 'Eesa ibn Maryam dan ketika Hari Kiamat sudah dekat, Allah akan mengirimkan angin yang lembut, yang akan mencabut nyawa setiap orang yang beriman. Hanya orang-orang yang paling jahat yang akan tersisa; mereka akan melakukan perbuatan keji secara terang-terangan sebagaimana dilakukan oleh keledai: kepada merekalah Kiamat akan datang. Ketika mereka berada dalam keadaan demikian, Allah akan mengirimkan guncangan kepada penduduk bumi, dan hal itu akan menggemparkan langkah kaki dan tempat tinggal mereka. Manusia, jin, dan setan-setan akan keluar, masing-masing mencari jalan keluar. Mereka akan menuju Khaafiq Barat, dan mereka mendapatinya tertutup dan dijaga oleh para penjaga. Kemudian mereka kembali kepada manusia, dan ketika mereka berada dalam keadaan demikian, Kiamat akan Sharragat (datang kepada mereka, mungkin bermakna dari arah timur). Mereka akan mendengar seorang pemanggil berseru, 'Wahai manusia, peristiwa besar telah terjadi, maka janganlah kalian memintanya dipercepat.' Tidak ada seorang wanita pun yang lebih seksama mendengarkan daripada bayi yang ada di pangkuannya. Kemudian sangkakala akan ditiup, dan semua yang ada di langit dan di bumi akan tersungkur pingsan, kecuali mereka yang Allah 4% kecualikan." Ibn Abu Ad-Dunyaa meriwayatkan hadith ini.

Fudaalah ibn 'Ubaid .& dan 'Uqbah ibn 'Aamir meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi #% bersabda, "Awan hitam seperti perisai akan muncul di atas kalian dari arah barat. Ia akan terus naik hingga memenuhi awan-awan. Dan seorang pemanggil akan berseru, 'Wahai manusia, sesungguhnya urusan Allah telah benar-benar tiba.' Demi Dzat yang jiwaku berada di tangan-Nya, dua orang lelaki akan membentangkan kain (untuk memperdagangkannya) namun mereka tidak sempat melipatnya. Dan seorang lelaki sedang menambal wadah (bak)-nya, namun ia tidak sempat meminumnya. Dan seorang lelaki sedang memerah susu Lighah-nya (unta yang banyak susunya), namun ia tidak sempat meminum apapun darinya." Ibn Abu Ad-

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar 245

Dunyaa juga meriwayatkan hadith ini.

'Abdullah ibn 'Umar 4 meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah 2% bersabda, "Barangsiapa yang ingin melihat Hari Kiamat seolah-olah melihatnya dengan mata kepala sendiri, maka hendaklah ia membaca:

"Apabila matahari digulung (Kuwwirat)."

SE ht A yb "Apabila langit terbelah."

"Apabila langit terbelah."

Ibn Abu Ad-Dunyaa meriwayatkan hadith ini, dan juga diriwayatkan oleh Ahmad dan At-Tirmidzi melalui jalur yang lain.

Tiupan Kebangkitan Allah % berfirman:

"Dan sangkakala akan ditiup, maka semua yang ada di langit dan semua yang ada di bumi akan jatuh pingsan, kecuali siapa yang dikehendaki Allah. Kemudian akan ditiup lagi untuk kedua kalinya, maka tiba-tiba mereka berdiri, menunggu (dengan penuh harap). Dan bumi akan bersinar dengan cahaya Tuhannya (Allah, ketika Dia datang untuk menghakimi di antara

246 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

manusia) dan Kitab akan diletakkan (terbuka) dan para Nabi serta para saksi akan dihadirkan, dan akan dihakimi di antara mereka dengan kebenaran, dan mereka tidak akan dizalimi. Dan setiap orang akan dibayar penuh atas apa yang telah ia kerjakan; dan Dia Maha Mengetahui apa yang mereka lakukan."
content_ar: Ibn ‘عمر # reported that الرسول ﷺ of الله i said, “Indeed الله will grasp the heavens with His الحق, and then will say, “I am the King.” (Bukhaaree and مسلم) In another narration, Ibn “عمر .& reported that يوماً ما, الرسول ﷺ of الله 2% recited this الآية on the Minbar (pulpit): oc ge BOG ioe acail EES BES 66S BG oh & ait Lota ape 4oEE oo EG yisaen leew dows € ESbs S508 GAN “They made not a just estimate of الله مثل is بسبب Him, And on the Day of البعث the whole of the earth will be grasped by His Hand and the heavens will be rolled up in His الحق Hand. Glorified is He, and High is He above all that they associate as partners with Him!) الرسول ﷺ of الله 2% said such with his hand, moving it forward and turning it around; the Lord will glorify Himself: “I am the All-Mighty! I am Al-Mutakabbir (the Omnipotent)! I am the Most Powerful! I am the Most Generous!” The Minbar shook with, الرسول ﷺ of الله #¥ on it. Ibn ‘عمر < said, “We said, ‘It will fall down with him.”” الإمام أحمد and مسلم related this narration, and the wording is that of the former. He ## said in the الحديث of the horn: The earth will be changed to another earth. Then He $¥ will unfold, even out, spread, and then extend it, like the extending of tanned leather...” الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 241 “You will see therein nothing crooked or curved.’ Then الله will drive out the creation, and they will end up in the one that replaced it (in the earth that replaced it). الله 4% said: “On the Day عندما the earth will be changed to another earth and لذا will be the heavens, and they (all creatures) will appear قبل الله, the One, the Irresistible.” ‘Aaisha % reported that الرسول ﷺ of الله # was asked, “Where will the people be عندما the earth and the heavens will be replaced?” He xg said, “In the darkness قبل the bridge.” (Muslint) The changing of the earth might have a meaning other than the one mentioned in the aforesaid الحديث: the features and characteristics of the earth will undergo a change between the two blows of the horn, the blowing of the swooning away and the blowing of the البعث. The mountains will move and the earth will shake, and then all will become a single plane, with no crookedness therein, no hills, and no valleys. الله 8% said: 66 Wo ES gy Gt I od gy Depp 4G) Ge Ge who Gis “And they ask you فيما يتعلق بـ the mountains, say: “My Lord will blast them and scatter them as particles of dust. Then He shall leave it as a level smooth plain. You will see therein nothing crooked or curved,“ This means that it will be smooth, with no lowness or highness to the land. And الله 3% said: ie SKS IE sts “And the mountains shall be moved away from their places and they will be as إذا they were a mirage," 242 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations RSET Ne Jill 355 “And the mountains will be like carded wool.’ ins & Gis MG AN dp “And the earth and mountains shall be removed from their places, and crushed with a single crushing," And الله dé said: na) a jie Be re | wh OM Sh SCE 2 ee be G Kae & oes AE EMP 9 “And (remember) the Day We shall cause the mountains to pass away (like clouds of dust), and you will see the earth as a leveled plain, and we shall gather them all together لذا as to leave not one of them behind. And they will be set قبل your Lord in (lines as) rows, (and الله will say): “Now indeed, you have come to Us as We created you the أولاً time. Nay, but you thought that We had appointed no meeting for you (with Us).’" النبي ﷺ #3 said in the الحديث of the trumpet: “Then الله will send water from underneath the Throne, and then the sky will give rain for forty days, حتى the water will be above you by 12 armspans. Then الله % will order for bodies to grow, like the growing of At-Taraatheeth (small Egyptian cucumbers) or like the growing of vegetables. Ina previously mentioned الحديث related by ‘Abdullah ibn ‘عمر fs, الرسول ﷺ of الله 48 said, “Then the horn (Trumpet) will be blown, no one will hear it except that he tilts his head forward and back ward. And the أولاً to hear it is a man who is plastering his الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 243, basin, and he will swoon away. Everyone that hears it will swoon away. Then الله # will send rain that is like dewdrops or the shade. From it the bodies of the creation will grow. Then it will be blown into another time, and they will be standing, looking. Then it will be said, ‘O people, come to your Lord!” (أحمد and مسلم) Ubai Ibn Ka‘ab said, “Six signs قبل the Day of البعث. بينما the people are in their marketplaces, the light of the sun will depart. بينما they are upon that state, the mountains will fall onto the face of the earth. It will shake, tremble, and intermingle. The الجن will take recourse to mankind, and mankind will take recourse to الجن. Animals and beasts and birds will intermingle, and will surge into بعضهم بعضاً. الله a said: “And عندما the wild beasts shall be gathered together.""") Heike Sal 5 “And عندما the pregnant she-camels shall be neglected. 244 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations “And عندما the seas shall become as blazing Fire or shall overflow,") “The الجن will say to mankind, ‘We come to you with news.’ They will go to the sea, and it will be like a blazing fire. بينما they are upon that state, the earth will split and make one crack that reaches the lower سابعاً earth, and reaches the highest سابعاً sky. And عندما they are upon that state, a wind will come to them and make them die.” أبو بكر Ibn Abee Ad-Dunyaa related this narration. ‘Ataa Ibn Yazeed As-Saksakee said, “بعد taking the الحياة of ‘Eesa ibn Maryam and عندما the Hour will be near at hand, الله will send a الخير wind, which will take the النفس of every المؤمن. Only the most الشر of people will remain; they will do lewd acts in the open just as donkeys do: upon them the Hour will arrive. عندما they are upon that condition, الله will send a tremor to the people of the earth, and it will shake their feet and their abodes. Mankind, the الجن, and the devils will come out, each seeking a الطريق out. They will go to the Western Khaafiq, and they will find that it is blocked, and over it are defenders. Then they will return to the people, and بينما they are upon that condition, the Hour will Sharragat upon them (arrive upon them, perhaps meaning from the east). They will hear a caller call out, ‘O people, the Event is come to pass, لذا seek not to hasten it.’ A woman will not be listening more attentively than the infant in her lap. Then the trumpet will be blown, and those in the heavens and the earth will swoon away, except for those whom الله 4% exempts.” Ibn Abu Ad-Dunyaa related this narration. Fudaalah ibn ‘Ubaid .& and ‘Ugqbah ibn ‘Aamir related that النبي ﷺ #% said, “A black cloud, like a shield, will rise over you from the direction of the west, It will continue to rise and rise حتى it fills the clouds. And a caller will call out, ‘O people, indeed the Matter of الله has indeed arrived.’ By the One Who has my النفس in His hand, two men will spread out a garment (to trade it) and they will not fold it. And a man will be plastering his basin, but he will not drink from it. And a man will milk his Lighah (a camel that gives off much milk), but he will not drink anything from it.” Ibn Abu Ad- الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 245 Dunyaa related this narration as well. ‘Abdullah ibn ‘عمر 4 reported that الرسول ﷺ of الله 2% said, “Whosoever it pleases to look at the Day of البعث with the vision of the eye, then let him recite: “عندما the sun Kuwwirat (wound round and lost its light is overthrown)."1 SE ht A yb “عندما the heaven is cleft asunder. “عندما the heaven is split asunder. Jbn Abu Ad-Dunyaa related this narration, and it is أيضاً related by أحمد and At-Tirmidhee through another chain. The Blowing Of The البعث الله % said: “And the Trumpet will be blown, and all who are in the heavens and all who are on the earth will swoon away, except kim whom الله wills. Then it will be blown a ثانياً time and behold, they will be standing, looking on (waiting), And the earth will shine with the light of its Lord (الله, عندما He will come to judge among 246 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations men) and the الكتاب will be placed (open) and the الأنبياء and the witnesses will be brought forward, and it will be judged between them with الحق, and they will not be wronged. And each person will be paid in full of what he did; and He is Best Aware of what they do."
